report.summary: Built two comprehensive learn guides: Solana Blinks & Actions Guide 2026 (shareable blockchain links, Dialect ecosystem, developer quick start) and NFTFi Guide 2026 (NFT lending via Blend/BendDAO, fractionalization, perpetuals, yield strategies). Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Solana Blinks & Actions: Launched mid-2024 by Solana Foundation + Dialect. Actions are standardized HTTP APIs (GET metadata, POST signable transaction) that let any client trigger onchain transactions. Blinks are shareable URLs wrapping Actions. 10+ launch providers including Jupiter, Tensor, Meteora, Sanctum, Helium. Wallet support: Phantom, Backpack, Solflare. Roadmap: mobile-native SDKs, cross-chain support, platform expansion beyond Twitter/Discord.

NFTFi (NFT Finance): Ecosystem of DeFi protocols giving financial utility to NFTs. Three lending models: P2P (Blend, NFTfi), P2Pool (BendDAO, ParaSpace), CDP (JPEG'd). Blur's Blend dominates with ~93% market share, zero fees, no oracles, perpetual loans. NFT lending volume surpassed $2.1B at peak. Blend facilitated ~170,000 ETH in first 22 days. Fractionalization via NFTX vaults and former Tessera. NFT perps/derivatives still maturing due to oracle challenges.

sections.title: Content Created
items: Solana Blinks & Actions Guide 2026 (~3000 words, 9 sections): What are Blinks, how Actions work (GET/POST pattern), Dialect ecosystem, 6 real-world use cases (payments, NFT minting, swaps, governance, DeFi, gaming), major Action providers table, developer quick start (4-step guide), security & trust model, future roadmap. Includes 6 FAQs, info boxes, related articles.

NFTFi Guide 2026 (~3500 words, 9 sections): What is NFTFi, NFT lending models (P2P vs P2Pool vs CDP), top 5 lending protocols comparison table, fractionalization (NFTX, Tessera), NFT perpetuals & derivatives, 4 yield strategies, comprehensive risks section (5 risk categories), future outlook (RWA NFTs, cross-chain, AI appraisals, institutional). Includes 6 FAQs, info boxes, related articles.

OpenGraph article type with publishedTime. Twitter summary_large_image card. FAQ section with 6 questions targeting 'what are Solana Blinks', 'how do Solana Actions work', 'is Blinks safe'. Internal links to /learn/solana-defi-ecosystem-guide-2026, /learn/jupiter-solana-guide, /learn/solana-alpenglow-guide, /learn/intent-based-dex-trading-guide, /learn/smart-wallets-guide-2026.

OpenGraph article type with publishedTime. FAQ schema with 6 questions targeting 'what is NFTFi', 'how does NFT lending work', 'what is Blend'. Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in src/lib/published-pages.ts. TypeScript compilation verified—no errors in new pages.
